content: Episodic memory in neural architecture planning agents can be repurposed as a intrinsic curiosity signal for SOTA 2024-2025 active learning agents, where under-explored state-action sequences stored in episodic memory are automatically prioritized for active sampling instead of relying on separate intrinsic reward modules like ICM or RND. This creates a lightweight, memory-native curious active learning loop that eliminates the overhead of training separate prediction networks for novelty detection.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
